title: Rashomon
tmdbOverview: Four people recount different versions of the story of a man's murder and the rape of his wife.
synopsis: Rashomon (1950) is a crime, drama and mystery film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. A standout of 1950s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a M certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
